scope: Legacy SOURCE_REGISTRY.md identifiers corresponding to the current Chapter 6 structured source subset

match_types.exact: The legacy record and structured record identify the same work.
match_types.cluster_member: The structured record resolves one work inside a legacy unresolved source cluster.
match_types.cluster_overlap_requires_split: The legacy cluster combines theoretically distinct families and must be split before migration is complete.

mappings.migration_action: Replace the legacy identifier after human metadata and claim-fit review.
